name: Sector Concentration Alert
description: Daily (11:45 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Queries Neo4j to detect if any strategy watchlist is overweight in a single sector (>40% of stocks). Creates diversification warnings before the scorecard runs.

parameters.content:
## Sector Concentration Alert

Required: neo4j, postgresApi
Flags watchlists with >40% in one sector
Reads FROM Neo4j graph relationships

parameters.query: MATCH (c:Company)-[:IN_WATCHLIST]->(w:Watchlist) MATCH (c)-[:BELONGS_TO_SECTOR]->(s:Sector) WITH w.name AS strategy, s.name AS sector, count(c) AS sector_count WITH strategy, collect({sector: sector, count: sector_count}) AS sectors, sum(sector_count) AS total_in_strategy UNWIND sectors AS s WITH strategy, s.sector AS sector, s.count AS sector_count, total_in_strategy, toFloat(s.count) / total_in_strategy AS concentration WHERE concentration > 0.4 RETURN strategy, sector, sector_count, total_in_strategy, round(concentration * 100, 1) AS concentration_pct ORDER BY concentration DESC

INSERT INTO alerts (ticker, alert_type, strategy, message, severity, metadata) SELECT '', 'sector_concentration', ?, ?, 'warning', ? WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alerts WHERE alert_type='sector_concentration' AND strategy=? AND triggered_at::date=CURRENT_DATE);

queryParameters.value: ={{'Watchlist ' + $json.strategy + ' is ' + $json.concentration_pct + '% concentrated in ' + $json.sector + ' (' + $json.sector_count + '/' + $json.total_in_strategy + ' stocks). Consider diversification.'}}
